extension.description: Excel for firmware — instantly evaluate C/C++ macros, constants, and YAML formulas with real computed values inside VS Code
config.title: CalcDocs
config.enabled: Enable or disable CalcDocs without uninstalling the extension.
config.scanInterval: Interval in seconds for periodic scanning (0 = disabled).
config.enableCppProviders: Enable CalcDocs providers for C/C++ as fallback (priority to C/C++ Tools).
config.useClangd: Enable optional clangd backend (LSP) for improved C/C++ symbol type and definition resolution.
config.cppDefines: Extra preprocessor defines used to evaluate #if conditions (NAME, NAME=VALUE, or -DNAME=VALUE).
config.cppUndefines: Preprocessor symbols to undefine after loading project settings (NAME or -UNAME).
config.cppConfiguration: Preferred configuration name in .vscode/c_cpp_properties.json. If empty, the first configuration is used.
config.cppCacheMaxEntries: Maximum number of preprocessed C/C++ translation units kept in LRU cache.
config.ui.invasiveness.minimal: Lower visual footprint: fewer hints and compact summaries.
config.ui.invasiveness: Global UI invasiveness profile used as baseline for CodeLens and Hover.
config.cpp.codeLens.maxItemsPerFile: Maximum number of C/C++ CodeLens entries shown per file.
config.cpp.codeLens.showAmbiguity: Show CodeLens for ambiguous conditional symbols.
config.cpp.codeLens.showMismatch: Show mismatch CodeLens when C/C++ values differ from YAML.
config.cpp.codeLens.showOpenFormula: Show CodeLens shortcut to open linked YAML formulas.
config.cpp.codeLens.showResolvedValue: Show CodeLens with resolved numeric values.
config.cpp.codeLens.showExpandedPreview: Show CodeLens with expanded expression previews.
config.cpp.hover.maxConditionalDefinitio: Maximum number of conditional definitions shown in hover.
config.cpp.hover.maxInDocumentDefinition: Maximum number of in-document definitions shown in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showConditionalDefiniti: Show conditional definition list in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showInDocumentDefinitio: Show multiple in-document definitions in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showInheritedAmbiguity: Show inherited ambiguity causes in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showFormulaSection: Show linked YAML formula section in hover.
config.cpp.hover.showKnownValue: Show known numeric value in hover when available.
config.inline.codeLens.maxItemsPerFile: Maximum number of inline CodeLens entries shown per file.
config.inline.hover.showDimension: Show dimension details in inline hover.
config.inline.ghost.enabled: Enable ghost values usage and inline rendering.
config.inline.diagnostics.level: Controls inline diagnostics severity for the new inline.* settings.
config.inlineCalc.enableCodeLens: Show inline calc results in CodeLens.
config.inlineCalc.enableHover: Show inline calc details in hover popups.
config.inlineCalc.diagnosticsLevel.warni: Report inline calc errors and warnings.
config.inlineCalc.diagnosticsLevel.info: Report inline calc errors, warnings, and info.
config.inlineCalc.diagnosticsLevel: Controls which inline calc severities are reported in diagnostics.
config.resourceStatusMode.aboveCpuThresh: Show runtime status only when CPU usage exceeds threshold.
config.resourceStatusMode: Controls when to show runtime status in status bar.
config.resourceCpuThreshold: CPU threshold (%) used when calcdocs.resourceStatusMode = aboveCpuThreshold.
command.forceRefresh.title: CalcDocs: Force Formula Refresh
command.setScanInterval.title: CalcDocs: Set Scan Interval
command.toggleEnabled.title: CalcDocs: Toggle Enable/Disable
command.toggleGhostValues.title: CalcDocs: Toggle Ghost Values
command.restart.title: CalcDocs: Restart (Clear Cache + Reanalyze)
command.runtimeMenu.title: CalcDocs: Runtime Quick Menu
command.setUiInvasiveness.title: CalcDocs: Set UI Invasiveness
command.showOutput.title: CalcDocs: Show Log Output
command.openTestFolder.title: CalcDocs: Open Extension Test Folder
command.inlineCalc.openGuide.title: CalcDocs: Open Inline Guide
command.generateCompileCommands.title: CalcDocs: Generate compile_commands.json for clangd
